title: Academy (disambiguation)
content:
{{Otheruses|Sith Academy}}
An '''academy''' was an institution for higher learning. There were several prominent examples:

==[[Canon]]==
===[[Galactic Empire]]===
The Galactic Empire maintained a network of [[Imperial Academy|Imperial Academies]] including the following:
*[[Royal Imperial Academy]] on [[Coruscant]]
*[[Academy for Young Imperials]] on [[Lothal]]
*[[Arkanis Academy]]
*[[Corulag Military Academy]]
*[[Defiance Flight Training Institute|''Defiance'' Flight Training Institute]]
*[[Imperial training center]] on [[Corellia]]
*[[Imperial Academy]]
*[[Imperial Academy of Eriadu]]
*[[Imperial Academy of Mandalore]]
*[[Imperial Academy of Uyter]]
*[[Junior Academy|Phelar Junior Academy]]
*[[Myomar Academy]]
*[[Imperial Naval Academy|Prefsbelt Fleet Camp]]
*[[Pretor Flats Academy]]
*[[Raithal Academy]]
*[[Skystrike Academy]] on [[Montross]]

===[[New Republic]]===
*[[New Republic Military Academy|New Republic Academy]]
**[[Hosnian Prime flight academy]]
**[[New Academy]] on [[Chandrila]]
**[[New Republic Military Academy (Ganthel)|New Republic Military Academy]] on [[Ganthel]]

===Others===
*[[Corellian Academy of Sciences]]
*[[Federal District Police Academy]]
*[[Junior Academy of Applied Sciences]] on Lothal
*[[Taharim Academy]] on [[Naporar]]
*[[Unidentified leadership academy]] on [[Alderaan]]

==[[Star Wars Legends|Legends]]==
===[[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]]===
The Jedi Order maintained a network of [[Jedi academy|Jedi academies]] in the millennia prior to the [[Great Jedi Purge/Legends|Great Jedi Purge]].

===[[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]===
*[[Coruscant Police training academies]]
*[[Senate Guard Academy]] on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]

===[[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]===
The Galactic Empire maintained a network of [[Imperial Academy/Legends|Imperial Academies]] including the following:
*[[Carida Academy/Legends|Academy of Carida]]
*[[Corulag Academy]]
*[[Coruscani Pilot Institute]]
*[[Imperial Institute of Higher Studies]] on [[Ferrhast]]
*[[Imperial Naval Academy/Legends|Prefsbelt IV Naval Academy]]
*[[Raithal Academy/Legends|Raithal Academy]]
*[[Rengali Imperial Naval Academy]]
*[[Vensenor Flight Academy/Legends|Vensenor Flight Academy]]
*[[Imperial Royal Guard Academy|Royal Guard Academy on Yinchorr]]

===[[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]===
*[[New Republic Fleet Academy]]

===Others===
*[[Bakur Senatorial Academy]] on [[Bakura/Legends|Bakura]]
*[[Chiss Academy|Chiss academy]] in the [[Chiss Ascendancy/Legends|Chiss Ascendancy]]
*[[Corellian Security Force Academy]] on [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]]
*[[Jedi Praxeum|Jedi Academy]] on [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin 4]]
*[[Mrlsst Trade and Science Academy]]
*[[Royal Academy of Government/Legends|Royal Academy of Government]] on [[Mandalore/Legends|Mandalore]]
*[[Shadow Academy]] space station
*[[Trayus Academy]] on [[Malachor V]]

==[[In-universe|Out-of-universe]]==
*"[[The Academy]]," an episode of ''[[Star Wars: The Clone Wars]]''
